article_title: Microsoft Agent Framework at Build 2026：从本地 Agent 到生产运行
core_theme: Microsoft Agent Framework 在 Build 2026 公布了面向生产 Agent 的一组新能力，重点是运行环境、托管部署、减少工具调用轮次和多 Agent 转交。
reader_takeaway: 读者可以判断这些更新分别解决什么问题，以及本地 Agent 走向生产服务时该关注哪些层。
summary_angle: 把 MAF 1.0 之后的新能力压成一条从本地执行到生产运行的路径。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 What is new 的 Agent Harness 章节，提到 shell、filesystem、人审、上下文管理、compaction、skills、web search 等内置能力。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧用一个可控工作台表示 Agent Harness 接管文件、命令和上下文。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Foundry Hosted Agents 章节，提到容器化部署、Foundry 托管基础设施、自动缩放、会话状态、观测和版本管理。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间用一个容器进入云端托管舱，表示从本地 Agent 进入生产运行。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 CodeAct 章节给出代表性工作负载数据：传统方式 27.81s、6890 tokens，CodeAct 13.23s、2489 tokens，提升 52.4% 和 63.9%。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧用压缩后的工具调用轨迹表示多步调用被一段 Python 程序合并。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Handoff 章节，提到 triage、billing、tech 三个 Agent 和有向转交边。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 背景里用三条轻量连线表示多 Agent 之间的转交流程。

main_metaphor: 一条从本地工作台通向云端运行舱的生产路径
primary_subject: 一个抽象 Agent 核心模块
subject_action: 沿着分层轨道从本地执行区移动到托管运行区
composition: 居中主物体，左到右推进，少量辅助信息块
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: European clear-line comic style, precise outlines, flat readable colors, tidy environments, restrained humor and detail
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；清线风适合把多个产品能力压成清楚的宽幅叙事。
style_safety_note: 该风格是泛类型描述，不涉及具体品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻。
avoid: 真实 Microsoft 产品截图
draft_goal: 验证宽幅封面是否能看出从本地 Agent 到生产运行的路径，并包含至少两个来自原文的叙事节点。
revision_targets: 如果像真实界面，改成抽象产品插画
如果信息块过多，保留 Harness、托管、CodeAct 三个主节点
如果可见文字过多，删掉 Handoff 标签
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: Microsoft Agent Framework Build 2026 updates for production agents. The reader should quickly understand the path from local agent execution to production hosting and faster tool-heavy runs.

Summary angle: compress the new MAF 1.0 follow-up capabilities into a left-to-right path from local harness to hosted production runtime.
Narrative flow: 3 beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- mechanism: Agent Harness adds controlled shell, filesystem, approvals, compaction, skills, and web search. Visible label: Harness.
- step: Foundry Hosted Agents move a local agent into managed infrastructure with scaling, sessions, observability, and versioning. Visible label: 托管.
- evidence: CodeAct collapses many tool calls into one sandboxed Python execution, with the source benchmark showing 52.4% faster time and 63.9% fewer tokens. Visible label: CodeAct, number chip: 52.4%.
- mechanism: Handoff declares directed transfers between triage and specialist agents. Visible label: Handoff.

Main metaphor: a production path from a local workbench to a cloud runtime chamber.
Subject: one abstract agent core module, moving along layered rails from a local execution zone into a hosted runtime zone.
Composition/framing: centered main object with left-to-right progression, clean supporting panels, wide 2.35:1 cover, readable at blog-card size.
Style/medium: combine product-poster style illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: European clear-line comic style, precise outlines, flat readable colors, tidy environments, restrained humor and detail. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: ink blue, warm white, signal green, muted coral.
Visible text policy: allow only 1-3 short Chinese labels or number chips by default, and no more than 4 when strictly necessary, all sourced from the information blocks. Each label <= 6 Chinese characters or one required product/model name. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real Microsoft UI screenshots, fake dashboards, fake architecture node names, dense HUD overlays, neon city backgrounds, generic robot pose, long English text.
